_source: Derived from the user's guide: docs/battle_brothers_guide_2026.md ('EARLY GAME > Who to recruit early', and the recruiting notes in the One-Page Cheat Sheet). The guide frames recruiting around cheap early bodies vs. premium later hires and stresses 'stars > current stats' for the long haul. Names are cross-checked to exist in backgrounds.json.
_note: The guide is early-game-focused on recruiting, so the mid/late lists reflect its 'premium hire' guidance (Adventurous Noble, Hedge Knight, Sellsword, Retired Soldier, Squire). A background can appear in more than one phase. Cripple/Beggar are omitted: the guide calls them emergency fatigue-fodder only, not recommended picks.

phases.label: Early game
phases.hint: Cheap bodies to fill 12 slots; hire lots, keep the ones with good stars.

phases.label: Mid game
phases.hint: Once the company is structured you can afford better base stats and wages.

phases.label: Late game
phases.hint: Premium hires worth the high wage - strong enough to slot straight into an elite line.
